name: Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam or boil potatoes until soft. Mash them, adding water, salt, pepper, and oil.
2. Set aside.
3. Saute onion in oil for a few minutes. Add broccoli, pepper, carrots, peas, tomatoes, basil, and salt. Bring to a boil. Cover. Simmer until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Add collards or kale and cook for another 5 minutes.
5. Put the vegetables into a medium baking dish. Top with mashed potatoes and sprinkle with paprika.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes and serve.
